---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest new features, page improvements, or experience enhancements / 提交新功能、页面优化或体验改进建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Background / 需求背景

Explain why this feature or change is needed.
请说明你为什么需要这个功能或改动。

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe what you would like to add or change.
请描述你希望增加或调整的内容。

## Expected Impact / 预期效果

What problem would this solve, or what benefit would it bring after completion?
这个改动完成后，能解决什么问题，或带来什么帮助？

## Optional Context / 可选补充

You can attach reference links, screenshots, sketches, or related examples.
可以附上参考链接、截图、草图或相关示例。
